fields.Name: Tag Aggregates
fields.UserQuestion: What are the aggregate statistics for all tags?
fields.Description: Returns per-tag item count and average relevance weight across all tagged items. Used by the Classify dashboard for taxonomy health metrics without loading individual records.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Aggregates vwTaggedItems grouped by TagID. Returns: TagID (tag identifier), ItemCount (number of items tagged), AvgWeight (average relevance weight, DECIMAL(4,2)). No parameters — full table scan. Lightweight for dashboards.
